title: Rocky's Galaxy
original_title: Rocky's Galaxy: A Totally Mundane Christmas Adventure
overview: Rocky is a young woman who just doesn't know what choices she should make in life,suffering from millennial indecisiveness and ennui, not knowing which piece to submit to a comic book art competition and whether she should get serious with the guy she's seeingor the girl she's seeing, who just found out about each other last night.
